title: What's New in 8.x
lead: Highlights of the Cachly 8.x release line. Many of the headline additions are part of Cachly Pro.

sections.heading: Cachly Pro (8.0+)
sections.text: Version 8.0 introduced Cachly Pro , a premium subscription. Its features rolled out across 8.x: Pro Offline Maps — worldwide OpenStreetMap vector maps with contours, trails and offline search. Counties / Regions and DeLorme Grid — visual found/not-found tracking by region. Auto Load Map — caches load as you pan the live map (long-press the reload icon, or enable in Settings › Cachly Pro). CarPlay — added in 8.1. See CarPlay . Multiple User Logging — added in 8.2 (log under several accounts at once).

sections.heading: New for everyone
sections.text: Online Drafts — view, edit and submit drafts in-app; they sync to geocaching.com and across devices. Rebuilt coordinate picker — five input formats (DDM, DD, DMS, the classic wheel picker and a Plain Text paste field), an “Updated” badge and one-tap Reset. Sync Live & Offline Map Position — keep the live map and an offline list’s map at the same place and zoom. Highlights in GPX — your highlight colors now round-trip through GPX import and export , and GPX import is much faster. Wherigo download — download a cartridge from a Wherigo cache via the ⋯ button (needs the Wherigo app installed). Account deletion , three coordinate copy formats, a larger profile with find count, and a built-in “What’s New” feed.

sections.heading: Other 8.0 improvements
sections.text: Maps: toggle trail colors/symbols, share cache location, better place search, Mapy.cz navigation, searchable state/country picker, more proximity-alert sounds, long-press the funnel to toggle filtering, adjustable live-search radius, Adventure Lab owned/found icons, indicator for ignored corrected coordinates, a cancel option on reload. Logs: favorite-heart indicator in My Logs, cache-type icon in place of the avatar, “Great story”/“Helpful” shown on your own logs, military-time date keywords, trackable-log keyword support. Offline lists: county-based filtering, pre-populated county lists, the Generate Counties tool (Pro), and removing caches across multiple lists. Importing: Dropbox/Google Drive via the Files app, append-to-personal-note option, Groundspeak personal-note support. Apple Watch: strike-through for archived/disabled caches and infographic complications. ℹ Cachly Pro is separate from a geocaching.com Premium membership and doesn’t change cache-type access or daily cache limits. See the Cachly Pro page.
